docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, GENEVIEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERKINS, GENEVIEVE $375.00 PRINCIPAL, $168.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $543.00, PLAINTIFF MAY RECOVER HIS BOOKCASE AND FUTON FROM THE PREMISES BY ARRANGEMENT WITH THE DEFENDANT OR THE LANDLORD. EITHER PARTY MAY REQUEST A S.F. POLICE CIVIL STANDBY TO SUPERVISE THE PICK-UP OF PALINTIFF'S PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-29-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-14-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, GENEVIEVE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.
